def test_16_order_tab_switch(self):
        """OL-02: 订单 Tab 切换"""
        order = OrderPage(self.mini)
        order.refresh_page()
        for i in range(order.get_tab_count()):
            order.click_tab(i)
            time.sleep(1.5)
